results.rendered_html: kalpa—taru m. one of the five trees (cf. pañca-vṛkṣa) of Svarga or Indra's paradise fabled to fulfil all desires (cf. saṃkalpa-viṣaya), the wishing tree, tree of plenty,  Hit. ;  Pañcat. ;  Ragh. i, 75 , xvii, 26
